name: sqlite-priority-fifo-queue
description: MergeQueue uses SQLite for persistent FIFO queue with priority ordering. Higher priority entries processed first; within same priority, FIFO by created_at timestamp. Status field tracks pending/conflict states.

name: conflict-retention-strategy
description: MergeQueue.process() returns MergeResult list and removes successful entries from queue. Conflicts marked as 'conflict' status (not deleted) for manual resolution. WorktreeManager.merge() called with agent_name to derive worktree.
